Phase 1 (2018–2019): Governance Takeover. Bleich maneuvered to gain control of Board and changed bylaws in secret.
Phase 2 (2017–2019): Knowledge and Concealment. Bleich explicitly informed of cellar's illegal status by Kornmeier.
Phase 3 (2019–2024): Systematic Obstruction. Three documented occasions Bleichs refused DOB entry. June 2024: sheetrock/cardboard erected over illegal bedroom doors.
Phase 4 (June 2024): The Perjured Affirmation. Bleich swore HVAC was family's sole heating source. Statement entirely false.
Phase 5 (May–September 2025): The Extortion Demand. Armed with perjury-obtained injunction, Bleich demanded $6–8 million for $2.5M unit.
